title: Garment Bags,5PCS Dustproof Garment Covers PEVA Translucent Clothes Covers with Zip Moth Proof Suit Protector Bags Waterproof Dress Covers for Shirts Coats Costumes (60X100cm)
features: LONG SIZE:Package includes 5 pieces of long size garment covers,each garment covers measures 60 x 100cm / 23.6*39.4inch,suitable for most of clothes,especially long size clothes,such as shirts,suits,uniforms,coats,jackets,dresses and so on.Perfect for your storage and travel needs.

PEVA MATERIAL:These garment bags are made of high quality environmentally friendly and recyclable PEVA material,waterproof,dustproof,mold resistant,tear resistant and snag free,durable to use.They are also washable and reusable,you can wash or wipe them clean and reuse them for many times.

TRANSLUCENT DESIGN:With the humanized translucent design,you can distinguish what clothes are inside the clothes covers and find out the clothes you need easily.Our clothes covers can not only protects your clothes well,but also helps to save your time for organizing and finding your clothes.

CONVENIENT TO USE:These garment bags are equipped with carefully lined and reinforced zip,moves smoothly without jamming or break,you can store and take out your clothes easily;The top opening makes it convenient for use of coat hook.And you can fold it to store when not use or take it with you when travel.

GREAT FOR CLOTHES PROTECTION:These garment covers can protect your favorite clothes from dust,mildew,moisture,insects or pet hair,and prevent your clothes from color fading,getting wrinkle or yellow and out of shape.With these garment protection bags,your clothes can stay clean and tidy.
description: Product Description Description: PEVA material,waterproof,dustproof,mold resistant,tear resistant and snag free Washable and reusable,lightweight and foldable,perfect for home and travel use With reinforced zip and top opening,convenient to use,translucent material helps to find your clothes easily Protect your favorite clothes from dust,mildew,moisture,insects or pet hair,keep your clothes clean,tidy and wrinkle free NOTE: Please measure the size of the clothes in advance to check if it is suitable. Please put clothes shorter than 95cm to avoid wrinkles. Material:PEVA Size:60*100cm/23.6*39.4inch Color:Translucent Package Weight:284g Package Includes: 5 x 60*100cm Garment Covers
